## [00:00 - 03:01]

## [03:01 - 06:04]

of ten on the appeal scale. And the difference between an offer that can convert on cold traffic and an offer that can never kind of get over that hump is that it's just simply not appealing enough. So the big thing I've kind of realized with this is you're actually better off putting out an offer that bombs than you are a mediocre offer because a bomb, you put it out and two weeks later, like this is a dud and you just get rid of it and you move on. But a mediocre offer that strings you along for eight months, for ten months that you constantly are devoting time, energy, copy, money, all that's testing to is really what kills you.
